data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of the northeast monsoon, it will still be cool in the morning over the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days. Meanwhile, with the band of clouds covering Guangdong thinning out, the weather will improve gradually over the region. It will be dry during the day towards the weekend. A strong easterly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong over the weekend. A band of clouds will cover southern China early to midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260305","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"Northeast force 4, occasionally force 5 at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
